content.text: mira's bedtime window is **7:30 pm**, and her wind-down runs three steps: bath → story → lights out. according to what you've told me, that routine is well-established and consistent. one thing worth noting from recent episodes is that on days when her afternoon nap is short, she tends to arrive at bedtime a bit cranky — on those days it can help to start the bath a little earlier (around 7:00) so she's not overtired by the time the story lands, since the **toddler sleep framework** notes that an overtired 18-month-old is harder to settle even with a solid routine in place. if you ever want to layer in something before the bath — like 10 minutes of dim lights and quiet play — that can act as a buffer on the rough-nap days without disrupting the core sequence you've already built.
